Description:
Ballistics of the 23x115mm for the AM-23 autocannon. AM-23 autocannon is produced in the PRC as the 23mm Type 2 aircraft autocannon.

Projectile		Mass	Type	M.V.		Charge
		g		m/s
-- Union of Soviet Socialist Republics --
OZ		174-175	HEI	705 (±10)		37.8 g 4/7
BZ-A		174-175	APIT	705 (±10)		39.0 g 4/7   
-- People's Republic of China --
WB-610P		... as OZ				37.0 g 4/7 Wax-Graphite, Web 0.40-0.48 mm,
WB-611P		... as BZ-A				Perf. Dia. 0.16-0.26 mm, Length 2.5-3.5  mm

Chamber Length:			89.6 mm
Chamber Volume:			42 cm³
Chambrage:			1.0 (estimated)
Breech Pressure:			3000 kgf/cm² copper crusher gauge, 329.8 MPa piezoelectric

References:
- 《航空自动武器设计手册》何志强，黄守仁，李载弘，国防工业出版社，1990
- Soviet Cannon: A Comprehensive Study of Soviet Guns and Ammunition in Calibres 12.7mm to 57mm, Christian Koll, 2009
